# Mango's Photo Booth Company
> Luxury photo booth, keychain, and magnet-station rentals for weddings,
> corporate events, birthdays, and quinceañeras in Southwest Florida.

- Service area: Fort Myers, Cape Coral, Naples, Marco Island, and all of Southwest Florida (Lee & Collier counties). Service-area business — we travel to your venue.
- Phone: +1-239-888-7688
- Email: info@mangosphotobooth.com
- Booking: Check Cherry "Check Availability" flow at https://mangosphotobooth.com/#book

## Packages (all include 3 hours of service + free SWFL travel)
- Classic Booth — $550 (open-air booth, touchscreen kiosk, unlimited on-site prints, choice of 2×6 or 4×6 print size, 1 custom template, themed props, standard backdrop, attendant, private gallery)
- Party Glam Booth — $650, most popular (everything in Classic plus skin-perfecting beauty filter, upgraded deluxe backdrop, both print sizes, 2 custom templates)
- The Big Kahuna — $1,300 (all-inclusive: full Glam Booth plus VIP red carpet with gold stanchions, premium custom backdrop, a Live Keychain or Magnet Memory Station, and a custom decor enhancement — balloons, arch, or florals)
- Add-on: Live Keychain or Magnet Memory Station can be added to the Classic or Glam booth for take-home favors.

## Details
- Photos shared instantly by text and email at the event; full private gallery delivered within 48 hours.
- Events served: weddings, corporate / brand activations, birthdays, quinceañeras, holiday parties.

## Services
- [Weddings](https://mangosphotobooth.com/weddings/)
- [Corporate & Brands](https://mangosphotobooth.com/corporate/)
- [Birthdays](https://mangosphotobooth.com/birthdays/)
- [Quinceañeras](https://mangosphotobooth.com/quinceaneras/)
- [Holiday Parties](https://mangosphotobooth.com/holiday-parties/)

- [Photo Booth Rental Fort Myers](https://mangosphotobooth.com/photo-booth-fort-myers/)
